name: Ignition RCE via Debugger
description: When debug mode is enabled, the Ignition error page allows arbitrary file write via _ignition/execute-solution, leading to RCE.
recommendation: Update facade/ignition to >= 2.5.2 and set APP_DEBUG=false.

name: Laravel Query Builder SQL Injection
description: The query builder in Laravel allows SQL injection via specially crafted column names when using JSON extraction syntax.

name: Laravel APP_KEY Deserialization RCE
description: When the APP_KEY is known, an attacker can craft a malicious serialized payload in an encrypted cookie, leading to remote code execution.

name: Reflected XSS via route parameter
description: Laravel framework reflects user-controlled route parameters in error pages without proper escaping, enabling XSS.

name: Reflected XSS via request parameter
description: Laravel framework reflects user-controlled request parameters in certain error responses without proper sanitization.

name: Environment manipulation via query string
description: When register_argc_argv is enabled in php.ini, attackers can manipulate the environment by passing arguments via URL query strings.

name: Query Builder SQL Injection
description: A SQL injection vulnerability in the Laravel query builder when using the limit/offset methods with user input.

name: Open Redirect via Host Header
description: Laravel trusts the Host header for URL generation without validation, which can be exploited for open redirects.
recommendation: Configure trusted hosts in Laravel middleware.

name: Blade Template Injection
description: When user input is rendered in Blade templates using raw output directives, arbitrary PHP code execution is possible.
recommendation: Use {{ }} instead of {!! !!} for user input. Validate all template inputs.

name: Laravel Debug Mode Information Disclosure
description: When debug mode is enabled in production, Laravel exposes environment variables, database credentials, and stack traces.
